productName: Phat Panda Maui Wowie Infused Preroll
description: This infused sativa pre-roll wraps Maui Wowie flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and citrus, delivering an upbeat, talkative energy. Pace yourself.
